name: Cova de Cala Varques B
starting_point: At km 9 of the Ma-4014 road connecting Porto Cristo to Porto Colom, there is currently a parking area.
equipment: If not practicing speleo-diving, a neoprene wetsuit for the aquatic area.
description: The largest of the four caves along the beach line at Cala Varques, while the other three (A, C, D) form a connected system. The entrance is semi-hidden among lentisk bushes. Inside, a gentle descent leads to a beautiful lake decorated with ceiling and phreatic speleothems.
full_description:
It is the largest cave of the four cavities found along the beach line, although the other three form a cave system designated ACD.

The access entrance to the cave is semi-hidden among lentisk bushes. Once inside, a gentle descent leads to a beautiful lake beautifully decorated with ceiling and phreatic speleothems.
